##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Ce,Ca)(Nb,Ti)_2_(O,OH)_6_

##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Don Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Black platy crystals and cleavages, massive
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110056
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ce_0.35_Ca_0.25_Nd_0.14_La_0.12_Th_0.06_Pr_0.04_Fe_0.03_Sm_0.02_Y_0.02_Gd_0.01_Sr_0.01_)(Nb_1.13_Ti_0.86_)O_6_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
